policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-amo-01 - Only allow APG-owned email domains as receivers'. For more information, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Azure+Monitor#IncidentremediationAzureMonitor-drcp-amo-01 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Azure Monitor Action Group Only allow APG email domains in alert receivers
policyDefinition.description: This policy ensures that only APG email domains are allowed as email receivers in Action Group alerts.

drcp.name: MonitorActionGroupRestrictEmailReceivers
drcp.controlDesc: Azure Monitor Action Groups: Only allow APG-owned email domains as receivers.

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
List of allowed email domains for receiving email notifications.
